testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'Sahils-MacBook-Air.local', ip: 'fe80:0:0:0:c0e:b926:2cc0:e9ab%en0'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session.
